description: Studio dev/combined-fixes stack: Automattic/studio trunk plus Chris's active local-dev PRs.

prs.note: Preserve custom db.php drop-ins during SQLite integration updates
Replace no-op spawn handler with native child_process.spawn bridge
Auto-mount host directories referenced in wp-config.php
Allow longer time-to-first-byte for AI API requests
Forward host stdin to wp-cli through the server daemon
